arts.ttl: Roma-Verona: two sides with different objectives
arts.sum: Matías Soulé, who scored in the last matchday, has scored twice against Hellas Verona in Serie A and has only done better against Cagliari (three); the Giallorossi player has not scored in two consecutive games in the competition since the period between December 2023 and January 2024, when the first of the two goals was against Lazio. Roma are unbeaten in 27 home games against Hellas Verona in Serie A (W21 D6); only against Atalanta and Bari (30) have the Giallorossi had a longer unbeaten run at home in the competition.

arts.ttl: Como Manager Fabregas Downplays Links to Milan and Roma
arts.sum: Cesc Fabregas liquidated the chatter about Milan and Roma but didn’t outright announce he would keep coaching Como next season in a pre-game presser: “I’ve not been contacted by any side, as I’m completely focused on us."
